apihelp-query+wbentityusage-summary: Waxay soo celisaa dhammaan aqoonsiyada shayada ee lagu isticmaalay bogagga la bixiyay.
apihelp-query+wbentityusage-param-aspect: Keliya soo celi aqoonsiyada shayada ee isticmaalay dhinacan.
apihelp-query+wbentityusage-paramvalue-a: Xiriiriyeyaasha goobta ee shayga ayaa la isticmaalaa
Cinwaanka bogga maxalliga ah ee la xiriira shayga ayaa la isticmaalaa
Bayaannada ka imanaya shayga ayaa la isticmaalaa
Dhammaan dhinacyada shayga waa la isticmaalaa ama waa la isticmaali karaa
Wax kale oo ku saabsan shayga ayaa la isticmaalaa. Tani hadda waxay tilmaamaysaa isticmaalka magacyada kale iyo hubinta tooska ah ee jiritaanka shayga.
apihelp-query+wbentityusage-paramvalue-p: Haddii la hawlgeliyo, URL-ka shayga ayaa lagu dari doonaa
apihelp-query+wbentityusage-param-entiti: Keliya soo celi bogagga isticmaalay shayadan.
apihelp-query+wbentityusage-param-limit: Inta jeer ee isticmaalka shayga la soo celinayo.
apihelp-query+wbentityusage-example-simp: Hel shayada lagu isticmaalo bogga <kbd>Main Page</kbd>.
apihelp-query+wblistentityusage-summary: Waxay soo celisaa dhammaan bogagga isticmaala aqoonsiyada shayga la bixiyay.
apihelp-query+wblistentityusage-paramval: Haddii la hawlgeliyo, URL-ka shayga ayaa lagu dari doonaa natiijada.
apihelp-query+wblistentityusage-param-as: Keliya soo celi aqoonsiyada shayga ee isticmaalay dhinacan.
apihelp-query+wblistentityusage-param-li: Inta jeer ee isticmaalka shayga la soo celinayo.
apihelp-query+wblistentityusage-example-: Hel bogagga isticmaala shayga <kbd>Q2</kbd> iyadoo lagu darayo URL.
Hel bogagga isticmaala shayga <kbd>Q2</kbd> halkaas oo nooca isticmaalka uu yahay sitelink ama statement.
apihelp-query+pageterms-summary: Hel erayada {{WBREPONAME}} (badanaa calaamado, sharaxaadyo iyo magacyo kale) ee la xiriira bog iyada oo loo marayo sitelink.
apihelp-query+pageterms-example-simple: Hel dhammaan erayada la xiriira bogga 'London', ee ku jira luqadda isticmaalaha.
apihelp-query+pageterms-example-label-en: Hel calaamadaha iyo magacyada kale ee la xiriira bogga 'London', ee Af-Ingiriisi.
apihelp-query+pageterms-param-language: Koodhka luqadda ee lagu helayo erayada. Haddii aan la cayimin, waxaa la isticmaalaa luqadda isticmaalaha.
apihelp-query+pageterms-param-terms: Noocyada erayada la doonayo in la helo, tusaale 'description', mid kasta waxaa loo soo celinayaa sida array xarfo ah oo lagu furayo noociisa, tusaale {"description": ["foo"]}. Haddii aan la cayimin, dhammaan noocyada waa la soo celinayaa.
apihelp-query+description-summary: Hel sharaxaad gaaban oo sharxaysa waxa bogga bartilmaameedku ku saabsan yahay.
apihelp-query+description-extended-descr: Sharaxaadu waa qoraal cad oo hal sadar ah, laakiin si kale waa mid aan xadidnayn (waxay ka koobnaan kartaa HTML tags ceeriin ah, kuwaas oo sidoo kale loo arko qoraal cad). Waa inaan loo isticmaalin HTML iyada oo aan la ka ilaalin!
apihelp-query+description-param-preferso: Ilaha sharaxaadda ee la doorbidayo haddii uu jiro:
apihelp-query+description-paramvalue-pre: Sharaxaadaha maxalliga ah ee lagu daro {{SHORTDESC:...}} parser function ee ku jira wikitext-ka bogga.
Sharaxaadaha dhexe ee ka imanaya shayga {{WBREPONAME}} ee la xiriira.
apihelp-query+description-example-centra: Hel sharaxaadda bogga 'London', adigoo doorbidaya sharaxaadda dhexe haddii ay jirto.
apihelp-query+wikibase-summary: Hel macluumaad ku saabsan Wikibase macmiil iyo keydka Wikibase ee la xiriira.
apihelp-query+wikibase-example: Hel jidka URL iyo macluumaad kale oo ku saabsan macmiilka Wikibase iyo keydka Wikibase.
apihelp-query+wikibase-param-prop: Hantiyada la doonayo in la helo:
apihelp-query+wikibase-paramvalue-prop-u: URL-ka aasaasiga ah, jidka script-ka iyo jidka maqaalka ee keydka Wikibase.
apihelp-wbformatreference-summary: Waxay u qaabeysaa tixraac si loo soo bandhigo isticmaalayaasha.
apihelp-wbformatreference-example-1: U qaabee tixraac madhan adigoo isticmaalaya qaabka Data Bridge una beddel HTML.
apihelp-wbformatreference-example-2: U qaabee tixraac ka kooban hal xaraf adigoo isticmaalaya qaabka Data Bridge una beddel HTML.
apihelp-wbformatreference-param-referenc: Tixraaca oo ah shay JSON ah.
apihelp-wbformatreference-paramvalue-sty: Qaabka uu isticmaalo [[mw:Special:MyLanguage/Wikidata Bridge|Data Bridge]]. Looguma talagelin isticmaal guud.
